Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS DEREK CHEUNG AND WAI CHEUNG'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES is GRANTED with final leave to amend to allege facts (not conclusions) in support of malice, oppression or fraud.
